{{Quote|Knire Dark, jah backa bundo.|Knire Dark introducing herself|audio=KnireDarkIntroduction.flac|<ref name="RR" />}}
<!--I think this means something like "Knire Dark, the backstage palace." or "Knire Dark, the real deal/bargain." Clearly says "Bundo" but may have been an attempt at "Bunko," if meant to be Huttese.-->
'''Knire Dark''' was a [[Syboona (species)|Syboona]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|Podracer]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]. Dark was active during the final [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], during which she used the [[Sports|sport]] of [[Podracing/Legends|Podracing]] as a front for her illegal smuggling activities around [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]]. Although it was merely a ploy, she held enough racing skill with her [[Serabyss Howler 1165]] to promote herself as the track favorite for the [[Ballast Complex]] racetrack on the [[Water/Legends|watery]] planet of [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]], despite her lack of any actual speed records for the course. Her smuggling career was later uprooted by [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] when Republic [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|authorities]] raided a [[Knire Dark's contraband storehouse|contraband storehouse of hers]].

==Biography==
===Fugitive Podracer===
{{Quote|The city's engineers assure us that the race won't have any effect on the city's safety, even if something should go…''wrong'' during the competition.|Race announcer [[Dax Gazaway]] describing the Ballast Complex, the track on which Knire Dark achieved fame|audio=DaxGazBallastComplexCitySafety.flac|<ref name="RR" />}}
[[File:Ballast_Complex_Redux.png|thumb|left|250px|Knire Dark became the track favorite for the Ballast Complex racetrack.]]
A [[Syboona (species)|Syboona]] [[Gender/Legends|female]], Knire Dark worked primarily as a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]<ref name="RRG" /> during the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]],<ref name="NEG1">''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]'' states that eight [[Standard year/Legends|years]] have passed since the events of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates ''The Phantom Menace'' to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. Using simple math, a date of [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]] can be surmised.</ref> during the final [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. To avoid Republic [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|authorities]], Dark purchased a [[Serabyss Howler 1165]] [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]] and entered the current [[Podracing/Legends|Podracing]] season, using the [[Sports|sport]] as a front to transport her contraband. She entered herself into the [[Podracing Open]] tournament, a series of four courses on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. She also [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|raced]] a few of the courses from the more aggressive [[Hutt Championships]]. However, even with her [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] disguise, Dark was commonly on edge when visiting any world that hosted Republic officials, and her nervousness was clear on the track: She did her best to avoid conflict with the other pilots and often stayed behind the pack, searching for the hidden paths that would allow her to escape notice. Yet if threatened, she would defend her position.<ref name="RRG" />

At some point, Dark managed to knock a competitor out of a race on the course known as the [[Ballast Complex]], located on the [[Water/Legends|water]] world of [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]]. Dark eventually became the Ballast Complex's track favorite, even though she did not hold any official speed records for the course. She was third on the chart for total knockouts on the track, however, standing with one total knockout.<ref name="RRG" />

===Republic crackdown===
{{Quote|Ooh, and Knire Dark goes down!|Dax Gazaway|audio=KnireDarkGoesDown.flac|<ref name="RR" />}}
[[File:Knire_Dark_Racer.png|thumb|right|250px|Knire Dark, racing her green Serabyss Howler 1165 on Mon Calamari]]
Even though Podracing was only a front, Dark's abilities on the track were nonetheless improving, as she topped the best lap and best three lap race speed records on the course known as [[The Brightlands]], located on the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]], with speed records of 00:52.65 and 02:59.38 [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]], respectively. She also became increasingly aggressive, achieving the third position for most knockouts on the track known as the [[Ruins of Carnuss Gorgull/Legends|Ruins of Carnuss Gorgull]], located on the jungle planet [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]], and on the Mon Calamari course [[Grand Reefs]], with a total of two knockouts and one knockout, respectively. She garnered further success on Gamorr during the [[Citadel (Gamorr)|Citadel]] course, reaching the second top position for best lap. Returning to Ryloth, she scored the second top positions for the course [[Nightlands/Legends|Nightlands]] for both best lap and best race, with a [[Time/Legends|time]] of 01:17.38 and 03:47.78 minutes, respectively.<ref name="RRG" />

Despite her collection of achievements, her blooming Podracing career was not to last.<ref name="SWE">{{CSWECite|I|166|Dark, Knire}}</ref> By [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Sepan">[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 49|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #49]] provides a [[Great ReSynchronization]] date of 13:3:28. This date corresponds to the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] on the [[Galactic Standard Calendar]], according to [[Template:YearMathGRS|the following explanation]].</ref> Republic authorities had finally caught up to her contraband trafficking and raided a [[Knire Dark's contraband storehouse|storehouse]] that the Syboona owned. The authorities uncovered hundreds of [[Kilogram/Legends|kilos]] of contraband, and the bust was [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 49|one of several Podrace-related scandals]] that put the sport's future in question.<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|49|sports/13328_1.html|Podracing Faces Uncertain Future}}</ref>

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Wor stop dookee!|Knire Dark celebrates a victory|audio=KnireDarkWinning.flac|<ref name="RR" />}}
Knire Dark was a paranoid individual, on the constant lookout for anyone who wanted to end her smuggling operation. However, despite this fear of capture, she opted to hide herself in plain sight by entering the dangerous world of high-speed Podracing. She developed a nervous quirk on the track when she tried to avoid contact with other racers, although she defended her position when necessary. Her occasional aggressiveness compelled her to knock other pilots out of a race instead.<ref name="RRG" />

Despite being new to the sport<ref name="RRG" /> by 24 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]],<ref name="NEG1" /> her career and abilities developed side-by-side, turning her into a formidable competitor.<ref name="RRG" /> Dark had [[Color/Legends|violet]] skin and orange [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. Her [[Limb/Legends|arms]] had more of a blue skin tone than the rest of her body.<ref name="RR" />

==Skills and abilities==
{{Quote|Poor Knire Dark, taking a beating out there!|Dax Gazaway overseeing Knire Dark's racing|audio=PoorKnireDark.flac|<ref name="RR" />}}
As a pilot, Knire Dark showed notable skill on the Podracing courses, racking up both speed and knockout records during her career thanks to her keen reflexes and agility, which allowed her to successfully traverse the hazardous obstacles and terrain that professional Podracing courses often presented.<ref name="RR" />

==Equipment==
{{Quote|Knire Dark had better start repairing soon.|Dax Gazaway comments on the shape of Dark's Podracer|audio=KnireDarkShouldRepair.flac|<ref name="RR" />}}
Knire Dark favored a Serabyss Howler 1165 Podracer for her brief racing career. The large craft was rather durable and could sustain moderate damage. Upgrades would only make it hardier. Dark's Howler was uniformly green in color, though lighter, yellow-green symbols were emblazoned onto the engine housings. More symbols of the same color existed on the cockpit's fin, which jutted out from the bottom of the cockpit. The upholstery of the cockpit's chair was brown with a faint green hue. The rear of the engines displayed alternating green and white stripes. Her victory purses could have been used to purchase parts from the [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] [[Merchant/Legends|junk dealer]] [[Watto/Legends|Watto]], which would have upgraded her Podracer into a more formidable machine.<ref name="RR" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Knire Dark, taking his lumps out there!|Dax Gazaway erroneously referring to Knire Dark as a male|audio=Knire_Dark_Taking_Lumps.ogg|<ref name="RR" />}}
[[File:Knire_Dark_CA2.png|thumb|right|150px|Full-color concept art for Knire Dark]]
Knire Dark first appeared in the [[Wikipedia:PlayStation 2|PlayStation 2]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]'' as one of twenty-three playable characters. The game was developed from a partnership between [[LucasArts]] and [[Rainbow Studios]] and was released in [[February]] [[2002]]. Her voice was provided by [[Nick Jameson]], who also voiced another racer, [[Aldar Beedo/Legends|Aldar Beedo]]. Players could play as Dark after placing above her or knocking her out of the Ballast Complex track.<ref name="RRG" />

The character's [[Species/Legends|species]] and some of her backstory were fleshed out in the game's companion guide, ''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'', which was published alongside the game. In-game, the race announcer [[Dax Gazaway]] incorrectly refers to Knire Dark with masculine pronouns such as "his."<ref name="RR" />
